description: Tier 1 PASS but Tier 2 RED (a blocking production hazard, e.g. a tool used but not declared in allowed-tools). R2 fail-fast: the behavioral tier never runs against a known production hazard, so t3 is SKIPPED and the final verdict is FAIL.
why: § 5 R2 fail-fast (production hazard) + § 6 R7 (t2=RED disjunct). Row (PASS, RED, SKIPPED) -> FAIL.
